title: Create Aeronautics: Big Globe Pressure
description: Scales world pressure for worlds using the Big Globe mod.
body:
This datapack scales the world pressure settings for worlds using the Big Globe mod along with Create: Aeronautics. Without this datapack, contraptions will hit a ceiling of flight around 300 blocks. This datapack allows you to go higher to reach those tall mountain peaks.

**If you'd like to use Big Globe with Aeronautics (or any other NeoForge mods), you need to use Sinytra Connector 2.0.0-beta12. Later versions do not function properly with Big Globe and will crash the game on startup.**

Feel free to use in modpacks or modify for your own usage.
